---
title: "Elisabeth Cohen: Reflections on Climate Change from a Mile High"
description: "Elisabeth Cohen will discuss her experiences working in the climate field and her reflections on the climate crisis."
image: "/files/headshots/elisabeth-cohen.jpg"
author: "Climate Guest Speakers"
date: "2026-04-13"
categories: [Climate and Community, Climate and Career]
#page-layout: full
#bibliography: references.bib
#csl: chicago-syllabus.csl
#suppress-bibliography: true
#link-citations: false
#citations-hover: false
listing:  #an example of listing external links
#  template: item-default-external.ejs
- id: speaker
  sort: "date asc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: 350px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - path: https://www.linkedin.com/in/elisabeth-cohen-9852274/#linkedin profile or personal website
      image: "/files/headshots/elisabeth-cohen.jpg"
      title: "Elisabeth Cohen"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Senior Program Manager/Advisor, Talking Climate Collaborative"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
#toc: false
---

## Title

{{< meta title >}}

### Time

{{< meta date >}}  

6:00PM - 7:00PM ET

### Venue 
Online via Zoom. Please [register](https://baruch.zoom.us/meeting/register/ZvRnp4MmTHSyn4DRzAr3sw) to participate.

## About

We are in changing times with our climate, technology and politics.  How do students, who are also navigating a time of transition prepare to make a difference?  What might you expect and advice from over 25 years of experience in the field. 


## Speaker

:::{#speaker}
:::


### Bio

Elisabeth Cohen is an environmental science practitioner with experience in environmental and energy policy, training, teaching, and science communication. 





<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
